mapper.select: SELECT e.*, a.display_name, a.icon_path FROM entry e LEFT JOIN player_account a ON e.account_id = a.id WHERE e.tournament_id = #{tournamentId} ORDER BY e.created_at ASC
SELECT e.*, a.display_name, a.icon_path FROM entry e LEFT JOIN player_account a ON e.account_id = a.id WHERE e.tournament_id = #{tournamentId} AND e.checkin_flg = 1 AND e.dropout_flg = 0
SELECT e.*, a.display_name, a.icon_path FROM entry e LEFT JOIN player_account a ON e.account_id = a.id WHERE e.id = #{id}
SELECT e.*, a.display_name, a.icon_path FROM entry e LEFT JOIN player_account a ON e.account_id = a.id WHERE e.tournament_id = #{tournamentId} AND e.session_token = #{sessionToken} LIMIT 1
SELECT e.*, a.display_name, a.icon_path FROM entry e LEFT JOIN player_account a ON e.account_id = a.id WHERE e.tournament_id = #{tournamentId} AND e.account_id = #{accountId} LIMIT 1
SELECT e.*, a.display_name, a.icon_path FROM entry e LEFT JOIN player_account a ON e.account_id = a.id WHERE e.qr_token = #{qrToken} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO entry (tournament_id, player_name, account_id, session_token, qr_token, checkin_flg, checkin_at, dropout_flg, dropout_at, manual_entry_flg, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tournamentId}, #{playerName}, #{accountId}, #{sessionToken}, #{qrToken}, #{checkinFlg}, #{checkinAt}, #{dropoutFlg}, #{dropoutAt}, #{manualEntryFlg}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE entry SET player_name = #{playerName}, account_id = #{accountId}, session_token = #{sessionToken}, qr_token = #{qrToken}, checkin_flg = #{checkinFlg}, checkin_at = #{checkinAt}, dropout_flg = #{dropoutFlg}, dropout_at = #{dropoutAt}, manual_entry_flg = #{manualEntryFlg}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE entry SET checkin_flg = 1, checkin_at = #{checkinAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE entry SET dropout_flg = 1, dropout_at = #{dropoutAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE entry SET dropout_flg = 0, dropout_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT e.*, a.display_name, a.icon_path FROM entry e LEFT JOIN player_account a ON e.account_id = a.id WHERE e.account_id = #{accountId} ORDER BY e.created_at DESC
